title: In the End
why_this_song: In the End by Linkin Park (2001) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: One thing I don't know why
It doesn't even matter how hard you try
Keep that in mind, I designed this rhyme
What it meant to me will eventually
Be a memory of a time when-
I tried so hard and got so far

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "doesn't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "doesn't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "matter" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "matter" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I tried so hard and got so far
Be a memory of a time when-

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: One thing I don't know why
Acting like I was part of your property
But in the end, it doesn't even matter

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "In the End", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "In the End", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "In the End" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "In the End" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "In the End" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "In the End", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: "In the End" was released in 2001. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "In the End" foi lançada em 2001. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.
